entries.original: Added a built-in `amazon-bedrock` model provider with configurable AWS profile support (#18744).
entries.translated: 로그 클라이언트에서 최소 로그 레벨 사용

entries.original: Added `/mcp verbose` for full MCP server diagnostics, resources, and resource templates while keeping plain `/mcp` fast (#18610).
entries.translated: [codex] 백엔드 호출 시 백그라운드 에이전트 작업 인증 사용

entries.original: Made plugin MCP loading accept both `mcpServers` and top-level server maps in `.mcp.json` (#18780).
entries.translated: 잘못된 셸 스냅샷 정리 경고 방지

entries.original: Improved realtime handoffs so background agents receive transcript deltas and can explicitly stay silent when appropriate (#18597, #18761, #18635).
entries.translated: [codex] 추가 백엔드 호출 시 백그라운드 작업 인증 사용

entries.original: Added host-specific `remote_sandbox_config` requirements for remote environments (#18763).
entries.translated: 테스트 중 auth.json 유출 수정

entries.original: Refreshed bundled model metadata, including the current `gpt-5.4` default (#18586, #18388, #18719).
entries.translated: /mcp에 대한 상세 진단 정보 추가

entries.original: Fixed `/copy` after rollback so it copies the latest visible assistant response, not a pre-rollback response (#18739).
entries.translated: TUI 피커에서 app server 스레드 이름 사용

entries.original: Queued normal follow-up text submitted while a manual shell command is running, preventing stuck `Working` states (#18820).
entries.translated: 사이드 대화에서 상위 스레드 상태 표시

entries.original: Fixed Unicode/dead-key input in VS Code WSL terminals by disabling the enhanced keyboard mode there (#18741).
entries.translated: Codex: thread/name/set 및 thread/memoryModeSet을 ThreadStore로 이동

entries.original: Prevented stale proxy environment variables from being restored from shell snapshots (#17271).
entries.translated: Protocol: 파일 시스템 권한 정규화

entries.original: Made `codex exec` inherit root-level shared flags such as sandbox and model options (#18630).
entries.translated: 비동기 직렬화 게이트에 세마포어 사용

entries.original: Removed leaked review prompts from TUI transcripts (#18659).
entries.translated: Models.json 업데이트

entries.original: Added and tightened the Code Review skill instructions used by Codex-driven reviews (#18746, #18818).
entries.translated: App_server를 통해 PatchUpdated 이벤트 연결

entries.original: Documented intentional await-across-lock cases and enabled Clippy linting for them (#18423, #18698).
entries.translated: 단순 TUI legacy_core 재내보내기 제거

entries.original: Updated app-server protocol docs for threadless MCP resource reads and namespaced dynamic tools (#18292, #18413).
entries.translated: [codex] 에이전트 ID 인증 테스트 픽스처 수정

entries.original: Fixed high-severity dependency alerts by pinning patched JS and Rust dependencies (#18167).
Reduced Rust dev build debug-info overhead while preserving useful backtraces (#18844).
